At 7515 Leake Ave. Big tree, full of plums on April 22nd. There is another one a few doors down Leake Ave. towards St. Charles Ave., but it is behind a fence. It hangs over the fence, though, because it is a huge tree. (Japanese Plum - Loquat or Prunus salicin
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
101 Andrea St, River Ridge, LA 70123, USA
All along the river in the woodline you will find a multitude of wonderful edibles throughout the year. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: February-November.
